description: Downloads llama.cpp binaries (CUDA, AVX2, KoboldCPP), extracts to dev directory, adds to PATH, and downloads GGUF/GGML models via aria2c.

messages.modelCatalogSummary: Model catalog: {total} models ({defaults} defaults), {size} total across categories: {categories}
messages.modelsDirPrompt: Enter models directory path (press Enter for default)
messages.modelsSummary: Models summary: {downloaded} downloaded, {skipped} skipped, {failed} failed (of {total} total)
messages.aria2cFallback: aria2c unavailable, will use standard downloader as fallback.
messages.scriptDisabled: llama.cpp installation is disabled in config.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Binaries and model tracking removed.

commands.all: Download all executables, extract, add to PATH, download all models (default)
commands.models: Download all GGUF/GGML models from catalog via aria2c
commands.uninstall: Remove all binaries, clean PATH, purge tracking
